title: Formula Based on Column Status
excerpt:
Hi, 
I’m trying to make a formula in an item column like this, but I don’t know if the second part is possible. 
{column 1}*({subitems#count) IF subitem status equals option 1)

posts.author: Jackson (Jackson Barry)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I’m trying to make a formula in an item column like this, but I don’t know if the second part is possible.

{column 1}*({subitems#count) IF subitem status equals option 1)
